missionFrame.function: Open the campaign, establish acting command, and seed the persistent recovery model.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: What does command save first when every visible choice leaves someone in danger?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Black Current from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve Project Mooring without authored evidence

phases.title: Recovery Posture
phases.summary: The newly promoted XO reviews the Serein's recovery configuration and Captain Lorne's standing priorities during an active Freehold salvage operation.
pressures: The player has been aboard only three days
Freehold crews are already inside the zone
The Serein cannot tow several major hulls at once
phases.directorPurpose: The newly promoted XO reviews the Serein's recovery configuration and Captain Lorne's standing priorities during an active Freehold salvage operation.

phases.title: Three Ships Return
phases.summary: A hospital transport, a weapons carrier, and a powered Starfleet hull emerge inside the salvage operation.
phases.directorPurpose: A hospital transport, a weapons carrier, and a powered Starfleet hull emerge inside the salvage operation.

phases.title: The Captain Falls
phases.summary: A current surge throws the Serein against a tractored wreck. Lorne is injured and the player must take the conn while the site remains active.
pressures: The crew is awaiting a clear command intent
phases.directorPurpose: A current surge throws the Serein against a tractored wreck. Lorne is injured and the player must take the conn while the site remains active.

phases.title: Triage the Zone
phases.summary: The player allocates the Serein, shuttles, transporters, tractor buoys, and civilian responders across the three wrecks.
phases.directorPurpose: The player allocates the Serein, shuttles, transporters, tractor buoys, and civilian responders across the three wrecks.

phases.title: Acting Command
phases.summary: With the immediate emergence resolved or abandoned, Starfleet confirms the player as Acting Captain and regional recovery commander.
pressures: No available order satisfies every faction
The crew is assessing the new command
More ships remain inside the current
phases.directorPurpose: With the immediate emergence resolved or abandoned, Starfleet confirms the player as Acting Captain and regional recovery commander.

decisionPoints.title: Opening Recovery Doctrine
decisionPoints.prompt: How will the Serein allocate rescue, towing, weapons control, and civilian delegation across the three emerging ships?
decisionPoints.stakes: Hospital patients; Possible Starfleet survivors; Live torpedoes; Serein condition; Freehold relations
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

decisionPoints.title: Captain Lorne Boundary
decisionPoints.prompt: What access, briefing role, and command boundary will apply while Lorne remains in sickbay?
decisionPoints.stakes: Medical recovery; Crew confidence; Lawful succession
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; listed options are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Opening Recovery Doctrine
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about opening recovery doctrine.

commandDecisions.title: Captain Lorne Boundary
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about captain lorne boundary.
